news.t: Tradr Launches First Ever Leveraged ETFs on Archer Aviation and Upstart Holdings

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long ACHR Daily ETF (ARCX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund provides 2x exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement of Archer Aviation stock. ARCX was launched on Jun 9, 2025 and is issued by Tradr.
